startUrls.title: Start URLs
startUrls.description: Category or Search URLs to start scraping from.

maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Maximum number of products to scrape.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of pages to visit (prevents infinite loops).

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy settings. It is recommended to use residential proxies for n11.com.
